title: US strikes first tanker with missiles as it enforces new blockade
summary_full: The US military targeted an unladen oil tanker which it said was heading for the key Iranian oil terminal on Kharg island.
summary_public: The US military targeted an unladen oil tanker which it said was heading for the key Iranian oil terminal on Kharg island.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: US military targeted an unladen oil tanker
